zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Foliot於大約1415年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特時，她的父親Thomas Foliot51歲，母親Mrs Thomas Foliot41歲。她於1415年與James De Clifford在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Foliot was born about 1415, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Foliot, was 51 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Foliot, was 41. She married James De Clifford in 1415, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1460, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Foliot est née environ 1415, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foliot, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Foliot, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé James De Clifford en 1415, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Foliotが約1415年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Foliotは51歳，母Mrs Thomas Foliotは41歳であった。1415年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでJames De Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターで46歳で死去した。

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Grace Foliot(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Foliot(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Foliot(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 James De Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Foliot родилась около 1415 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Foliot было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Foliot, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James De Clifford в 1415 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
